$schema: internal draft — pricing reference for QOAT seed data generation
$notes: Curated collaboratively. Approved batches added incrementally. Formalised into seeder source at Step 2.b.v.

small.scope: Cabinet reface, benchtop swap, backsplash, retain layout

medium.scope: Full rebuild, new cabinets, standard stone benchtop, mid-range appliances, existing layout

large.scope: Full rebuild + layout change + premium finishes (stone, imported tile, integrated appliances)

small.scope: Vanity swap, tapware refresh, retile shower recess only

medium.scope: Full main bathroom or ensuite rebuild, standard tiles + fittings, retain layout

large.scope: Full rebuild + layout change + premium finishes (stone, freestanding bath, imported tile)

small.scope: Cabinet + benchtop refresh, retain layout

medium.scope: Full rebuild, new cabinets, benchtop, sink, appliance space

large.scope: Full rebuild + layout change + premium finishes (stone benchtop, cabinetry to ceiling)

small.scope: Paint + new flooring + light updates, no structural

medium.scope: Structural changes (single wall out, opened plan), new flooring throughout

large.scope: Major reconfiguration, ceiling changes, high-end finishes, potentially load-bearing work

small.scope: ~10-25m² addition (sunroom, small bedroom + ensuite)

medium.scope: ~30-60m² addition (2 bedrooms, family room extension)

large.scope: 60m²+ or second-storey addition

small.scope: Storage-focused conversion, no dormer, no plumbing

medium.scope: Habitable bedroom, insulation, flooring, single window addition

large.scope: Habitable rooms + ensuite, dormer additions, structural work

small.scope: Basic conversion — insulation, lining, flooring

medium.scope: Habitable room with power, HVAC, potentially kitchenette

large.scope: Full granny flat or self-contained studio conversion

small.scope: Basic habitable-ish upgrade (waterproofing, flooring, lighting)

medium.scope: Fully habitable rec room / office

large.scope: Bedroom + bathroom + kitchenette, full self-contained

small.scope: Cosmetic across whole house — paint, flooring, minor kitchen/bath updates

medium.scope: Full kitchen + bathrooms + flooring + paint, some structural

large.scope: Complete gut renovation, layout changes, premium finishes

small.scope: Kit home / small 2-3 bedroom (~100m²), standard finish

medium.scope: Standard 3-4 bedroom family home (~180-220m²), mid-range finish

large.scope: 250m²+, premium finish, custom design, potentially double-storey

small.scope: Minor repair, patch, few tile replacements, small leak fix

medium.scope: Partial replacement (e.g. one roof section, gutter + fascia), tile respray

large.scope: Full roof replacement — Colorbond or full retile — average 150-200m² house

rate.notes: Standard grey concrete slab, straightforward access. Exposed aggregate + $30-60/m² premium. Coloured/stamped concrete top of range. Access constraints push higher.
Timber paling ~$95/m, Colorbond ~$150/m, aluminium/tubular ~$220/m, frameless glass pool fencing $800-1200/m. Wide because materials are so different.
Treated pine ~$200-300/m², merbau/spotted gum ~$350-500/m², composite (Trex etc) $450-700/m². Structural changes (raised platforms, roof over) add ~30%.

small.scope: Garden-bed retention, sleeper wall, under 1m high, 5-10m long

medium.scope: Concrete block or timber, 1-2m high, 15-30m long

large.scope: Engineered concrete/steel, over 2m high, or long runs, requires engineering

small.scope: Shed, small outbuilding, single-room removal

medium.scope: Garage, carport, partial house demolition

large.scope: Full house demolition + site clearance + disposal

band.scope: Bathroom or wet area waterproofing, membrane + coating (~$50-80/m²)

small.scope: Extension footings, small structural additions

medium.scope: House-scale footings, standard site conditions

large.scope: Difficult site (reactive soil, sloping block, underpinning)

small.scope: Single powerpoint install, single light, small fault repair, safety switch

medium.scope: Room-scale rewire, switchboard upgrade, downlight install throughout room

large.scope: Whole-house rewire or major switchboard replacement

calloutFee.notes: Standard business hours diagnostic. After-hours 1.5-2x. Some sparkies waive if job proceeds.

hourlyRate.notes: Metro AU average. Rural/remote higher due to travel. Certified/specialty (data, solar) top of range.

small.scope: Tap replacement, blocked drain clear, single fitting fix, small leak

medium.scope: Hot water swap, kitchen/bathroom re-plumbing, gas connection

large.scope: Whole-house re-plumb, main sewer replacement, major bathroom + kitchen

calloutFee.notes: Similar to electrical. Blocked drain + specialist equipment call-outs top of range.

hourlyRate.notes: Metro AU. Gas-fitting or licensed hot water higher. Master plumber premium.

small.scope: Single split system install (2-3.5kW), standard back-to-back

medium.scope: Multi-head split system OR large-capacity single unit, more complex install

large.scope: Full ducted reverse-cycle system, whole-house zoning

calloutFee.notes: Refrigeration mechanics often charge higher call-out than sparkies. Diagnostic on ducted system towards top.

hourlyRate.notes: Refrigeration-licensed premium over general HVAC install.

rate.notes: Interior walls: cheap end is single coat roller/brush, $35-45/m² typical for two-coat prep + paint. Ceilings + heights add ~30%. Exterior often $45-70/m² for prep-heavy jobs.
Standard set: $30-50/m². Full sheet + set (new gyprock): $50-80/m². Ceiling + cornices: higher. Repairs to existing walls higher per m² for small patches.
Labour only: $50-70/m² for standard porcelain. Supply + install: $85-130/m² for mid-range tile. Premium (stone, large-format, imported): $150-250/m².

small.scope: Hang a door, small repair, single shelf install, skirting patch

medium.scope: Built-in wardrobes, custom shelving, structural repairs, doorframes

large.scope: Full custom cabinetry, structural additions, complex builds

calloutFee.notes: Lower call-out than electrical/plumbing — carpenters often bundle into job pricing. Some don't charge separately.

hourlyRate.notes: Wide range because 'carpentry' spans site labourers ($65-80) through cabinet makers ($100-140+). Custom cabinetry premium.

rate.notes: Basic single-glazed window replacement: $250-450. Standard double-glazed: $550-900. Large picture windows or bifolds: $1500-3000. Premium (frameless, thermal, custom) higher.

band.scope: Standard call-out — lock repair, replace deadbolt, cut keys, gain entry (call-out $80-140 + parts, after-hours or rekeying whole house top of range)

small.scope: Single garden bed refresh, mulch + plants, small planting scheme

medium.scope: Backyard refresh — turf, planting, edging, feature elements

large.scope: Full backyard design + hardscaping, retaining, water features, pergola

band.scope: Standard mow + edge, one-off or recurring visit. Large blocks + hedging top of range

small.scope: Prune single tree, remove small tree (under 5m), hedge trim

medium.scope: Multiple tree removal, larger tree (5-15m), stump grinding

large.scope: Multiple large trees, crane access, complex removal, land clearing. Protected species / permits add compliance cost

band.scope: Standard pest control treatment (roaches, spiders, ants) — full house. Termite inspection/treatment $500-1500+

small.scope: Heater install, equipment swap, resurface small pool

medium.scope: Pool renovation (retile, new pumps, coping), or spa install

large.scope: New in-ground pool build (fibreglass to concrete), landscaping around

rate.notes: Plain concrete: $75-100/m². Exposed aggregate: $110-160/m². Coloured/stamped: $150-220/m². Pavers (brick/stone): $120-250/m². Long driveways slight discount per m².

small.scope: Small drip system for garden beds, single zone

medium.scope: Multi-zone system, pop-up sprinklers for lawn, controller

large.scope: Full property smart irrigation with sensors, multiple zones, backflow prevention

small.scope: Few path/spot lights installed, single circuit

medium.scope: Property-scale outdoor lighting scheme, multiple zones, sensors

large.scope: Full landscape lighting design, low-voltage system, controls, feature lighting

band.scope: Standard exterior cleaning — windows OR gutters OR pressure wash. Combined services top of range

rate.notes: Standard 6.6kW residential system: ~$4-6k after STC rebate. Higher-quality panels (LG, REC, SunPower) top of range. Micro-inverter systems 30-40% premium over string inverter. Pre-rebate ~$2k/kW; rebate significantly reduces effective rate.
Tesla Powerwall 2 (~13.5kWh) $12-15k installed. AlphaESS + Sungrow cheaper per kWh. Larger battery stacks slightly better per-kWh economics. Includes hybrid inverter for retrofit installs.
Ceiling batts (R4.0-6.0): $20-30/m² supplied + installed. Wall batts $30-40/m². Underfloor $35-55/m². Spray foam or thermal upgrade premium. Retrofit access adds cost.

band.scope: Standard hot water system replacement — gas storage, electric, heat pump, or solar. Includes install. Electric storage $1-2k, gas storage $1.5-3k, heat pump $3-5k (with rebates), solar HW $4-6.5k

small.scope: Single-room heater install — gas space heater, wood heater, or electric panel

medium.scope: Multi-zone gas ducted heating OR hydronic single-loop

large.scope: Full hydronic heating with boiler + multi-zone panels, or premium ducted system with zoning

small.scope: Single split system install (2-3.5kW), standard back-to-back

medium.scope: Multi-head split OR large-capacity single, multiple rooms

large.scope: Full ducted reverse-cycle system, whole-house zoning

band.scope: Standard home wall charger install (7-22kW), single-phase or three-phase. Basic charger unit $800-1500 + install $500-1500. Three-phase upgrades or switchboard work push higher

rate.notes: Basic roller blinds: $80-200. Roman/venetian: $200-500. Motorised: $400-800. Plantation shutters: $600-1,500. Custom timber shutters: $1,500-2,200+. Supply + install pricing.
Off-the-shelf ready-made curtains: $80-200/window. Custom (fabric + make + install): $400-1,000. Premium (silk, custom lining, motorised): $1,200-1,800+. Sheers add ~$200-400/window.

Standard aluminium sliding window: $400-700. Timber-framed: $800-1,500. Double-glazed premium (thermally broken, energy-rated): $1,200-2,500. Bifold doors, large sliders: $2,500-4,500+. Custom sizes premium.

Laminate: $25-50/m². Vinyl plank: $30-70/m². Engineered timber: $70-140/m². Solid hardwood: $100-200/m². Bamboo: $65-120/m². Premium (parquetry, wide-plank oak, natural stone): $180-250+/m². Supply only.

Pine framing timber (90x45): $6-10/lm. Treated pine decking: $10-18/lm. Merbau decking: $18-35/lm. Spotted gum: $25-45/lm. Structural LVL: $20-60/lm. Wide range because timber grade + dimension varies.

small.scope: Single fitting or tap swap — tap, single cabinet knob set, splashback tiles for small area

medium.scope: Multiple fittings — new tapware set, cabinet handles, splashback, minor cabinetry

large.scope: Full kitchen fit-out — cabinetry, benchtop, sink, tapware, handles, splashback, but no structural (excludes install labour)

small.scope: Single tap set, showerhead, single vanity/mirror

medium.scope: Vanity + tapware + shower fittings + minor tile supply

large.scope: Full bathroom fit-out — vanity, tapware, shower, toilet, tiles, accessories (excludes labour)

rate.notes: Budget interior wall paint: $6-9/L. Standard premium (Dulux, Wattyl mid-range): $10-16/L. Premium/specialty (limewash, chalkboard, low-VOC eco): $18-25/L. Fashion/designer brands (Bauwerk, Porter's, Farrow & Ball): $30-50+/L.

band.scope: Standard single appliance — dishwasher, oven, cooktop, rangehood, washer, dryer, or fridge. Entry-level $400-800, mid-range mainstream (Bosch, Fisher & Paykel) $1,200-2,500, premium (Miele, Gaggenau, Sub-Zero) $3,500-8,000+

rate.notes: Cement bag (20kg): $8-14. Standard brick: $1-3. Gyprock sheet (10mm 2400x1200): $12-25. Plywood sheet: $30-90. Cladding sheets: $35-180. Wide because 'unit' is inconsistent — used mostly for quotes that price line items separately.
Basic LED downlight: $15-40. Standard pendant/ceiling: $80-200. Designer pendants: $250-600. Chandelier/statement lighting: $600-1,500+. Smart lighting (Philips Hue, integrated) premium.
